script.text: 위시본 가족의 한바탕 소동극을 그리고 있는 애니메이션
우리 몬스터 패밀리에 나오는 등장인물 중
And his appearance and voice go well together
How does his voice and his appearance
약간 악당들이 그래도 좀 매력적으로 보이는 경향이 있잖아요
Ah you like the bad guys?
Is your husband the bad guy?
He is famous for playing bad guys
Was one of my favorite movies
Evil에 대한 역할을 잘하는 그런 배우였군요
got a crush on her voice
He has never seen her face
They just had a phone call
And he seems to be very lonely
And then I will marry her
I've seen it in a movie
When do you use this word?
Personally I use it when I eat an amazing meal
to compliment the person who made the meal
뭔가 아름다운, 정교한, 그리고 음식에 있어서도
그래서 Not Going Anywhere 이라는 곡 속에도
This is why I always whisper
I'm a river with a spell
so that I can recognize them
Yes I can definitely recognize that song
He doesn't have a soul himself
but he wants her to have a soul
